description: Execute the council-approved Wave 1 of the 026 graph-and-context-optimization restructure: 4 top-level renames + 7 PROCEED merges + 8 CONTAINED deletes + 28 DEEP archives + 3 parent-doc rewrites + 3 index refreshes. Reduced variant captures ~75% of recall benefit at ~40% effort vs full plan per council 2026-05-16.
